body.purpose: Descriptions, notes, message content, passive reading.

label.purpose: Form labels, column headers, button text, nav items — all interactive labeling.

fine.purpose: Character counts, link underlines, mobile overrides for all sizes.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Default state transition on buttons and inputs. PC-only (gated behind @include pc / @include hover).

motion.name: popup-fade
motion.purpose: Opacity fade for modal/popup enter and leave transitions.

motion.name: checkbox-snap
motion.purpose: SVG checkmark scale(0) → scale(1) on checkbox check.

motion.name: loader-spin
motion.purpose: 3D perspective box-shadow animation for the loading indicator.

breakpoints.name: mobile-only
breakpoints.purpose: Extra-small layout: font sizes drop to 10px, compact padding.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Mid-range: shares mobile font sizing, touch-friendly targets.

breakpoints.name: pc
breakpoints.purpose: Desktop: hover transitions enabled, full font scale.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action. One per context. Violet background, always 40px tall.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; min-height: 40px; padding: 8px 20px; background: #7c59bc; color: #DEDEE7; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Noto Sans', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.3s; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #8f70c6; } .ds-btn-primary:active, .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { background: #6743b2; outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled, .ds-btn-primary[aria-disabled='true'] { opacity: 0.24; pointer-events: none; background: rgba(250,250,250,0.04); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost action subordinate to primary. Transparent at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; min-height: 40px; padding: 8px 20px; background: transparent; color: #DEDEE7; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Noto Sans', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.3s; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(250,250,250,0.04); } .ds-btn-secondary:active, .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { background: #7c59bc; outline: none; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Square ghost button for icon-only actions. 40×40 or 32×32.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-icon" aria-label="Schließen"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 40px; height: 40px; padding: 8px; background: transparent; color: #DEDEE7; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s; } .ds-btn-icon:hover { background: rgba(250,250,250,0.04); } .ds-btn-icon:active, .ds-btn-icon:focus-visible { background: #7c59bc; outline: none; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Ghost border appears on hover and focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; } .ds-input__label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-family: 'Noto Sans', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #DEDEE7; } .ds-input__container { display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding: 0 16px; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: #202024; transition: border-color 0.3s; } .ds-input__container:hover { border-color: #30303C; } .ds-input__container:focus-within { border-color: #7c59bc; } .ds-input__field { width: 100%; padding: 12px 0; border: none; background: none; outline: none; font-family: 'Noto Sans', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #DEDEE7; } .ds-input__field::placeholder { color: rgba(222, 222, 231, 0.5); }

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: 16×16 checkbox with animated checkmark. Violet fill on checked.
components.css: .ds-checkbox { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; font-family: 'Noto Sans', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #DEDEE7; } .ds-checkbox__box { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 16px; height: 16px; min-width: 16px; border: 1px solid #EDEDF2; border-radius: 4px; transition: background 0.3s, border-color 0.3s; } .ds-checkbox__check { transition: transform 0.3s; transform: scale(0); color: #DEDEE7; } .ds-checkbox input:checked ~ .ds-checkbox__box, .ds-checkbox--checked .ds-checkbox__box { background: #7c59bc; border-color: #7c59bc; } .ds-checkbox--checked .ds-checkbox__check { transform: scale(1); }

components.name: Status Badge — Success
components.description: Semantic repair-status chip. Color encodes workflow state.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; min-height: 16px; padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Noto Sans', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #DEDEE7; line-height: 1; } .ds-status--success { background: #57b143; } .ds-status--warning { background: #b18c43; } .ds-status--error { background: #b14357; } .ds-status--primary { background: #6743b2; } .ds-status--muted { background: #bfbfc2; color: #202024; }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.description: Sticky top bar. Deep surface, violet for active items, ghost for inactive.
components.html:
Manager
DashboardAnfragen
components.css: .ds-header { position: sticky; top: 0; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 0.5fr 2fr 0.5fr; gap: 12px; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding: 9px; background: #131316; } .ds-header__brand { font-family: 'Noto Sans', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #DEDEE7; } .ds-header__nav { display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; min-height: 40px; padding: 8px 20px; background: transparent; color: #DEDEE7; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Noto Sans', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.3s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(250,250,250,0.04); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #7c59bc; } .ds-nav-item--active:hover { background: #8f70c6; }

narrative.overview:
ProductManager is built on the logic of a well-kept technical record: every row has a purpose, every column is labeled, and nothing is there because it looked good. The dark substrate is not aesthetic preference — it's the natural context of a workshop environment where people work long shifts and the interface should recede, leaving only the content lit. The purple accent appears selectively, like ink on a ledger: marking what's actionable, signaling current state, never decorating.

The system earns trust through consistency. A button looks the same whether you're an admin or a customer. A status badge carries the same weight across every view. The hierarchy is communicated through spacing rhythm and font weight, not through visual flourish. Depth comes from layered dark surfaces — the header sits at the absolute base (#131316), the body one step up (#18181B), cards and inputs another step up (#202024) — with no shadows needed because the tonal separation is clear.

This system explicitly rejects the generic SaaS clone aesthetic and the enterprise bloat of over-chromed tools.
keyCharacteristics: Single-family typography (Noto Sans variable) across all roles — no decorative pairing
Flat-by-default elevation: tonal layering over shadows, ghost borders over static strokes
Semantic color vocabulary that maps 1:1 to repair workflow states
PC-only hover transitions — touch devices get instant feedback
Invertible light/dark theme: the dark gray and light gray scales swap symmetrically
Technical Violet used exclusively for primary actions, active selection, and focus indicators — never decoration

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Technical Violet appears only on primary actions, active selection, and focus indication. It must never appear as a decorative tint, card accent, or section header. Its scarcity is the trust signal.

rules.name: The Semantic Lock Rule
rules.body: Success green, warning amber, error rose, and info teal are reserved exclusively for state communication. They do not appear as branding, section differentiation, or visual interest.

rules.name: The Tonal Stack Rule
rules.body: Dark surfaces are never at the same depth as their containers. The three-layer stack (surface-deep → surface-base → surface-elevated) must remain legible without shadow.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Noto Sans only. Do not introduce a display typeface for headings, a mono face for data, or a serif for editorial pull-quotes. The system has no editorial ambitions; it is a tool.

rules.name: The Weight Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Weight 600 = interactive or labeling. Weight 400 = descriptive or passive. Never invert these.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Add no shadows to new components. If something needs to feel 'elevated,' use a darker background container or a ghost border, not a drop shadow.

rules.name: The Ghost Border Rule
rules.body: Interactive containers use a transparent 2px border at rest. Never a visible static stroke. The border appears only on hover and focus.

dos: Do use surface-elevated (#202024) as the background for inputs and interactive containers. Always pair with a ghost border.
Do use Technical Violet (#7c59bc) as the single interactive accent.
Do use 600 weight for all interactive labels and 400 for descriptive body copy.
Do communicate status through the semantic color map — repair states are immutable to their colors.
Do apply hover transitions with @include pc / @include hover only. Touch users get instant state changes.
Do use ghost borders (transparent 2px at rest, colored on hover/focus) for all interactive containers.
Do keep the three-layer tonal stack intact: #131316 → #18181B → #202024.
Do give every interactive component all five states: default, hover, focus, active, disabled.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. Every transition and animation must have an instant fallback.
donts: Don't use Technical Violet as a decorative color, section background, card tint, or illustration element.
Don't introduce a second typeface. NotoSans handles every role.
Don't add box-shadows. Depth is tonal.
Don't build components that look like Generic SaaS clones (Linear/Notion: teal/blue accents, identical card grids, all-caps tracked eyebrows).
Don't build Enterprise bloat (SAP/Jira: dense chrome, modal-within-modal, status fields that need training).
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent on cards or list items.
Don't apply orchestrated page-load sequences or stagger animations across sections.
Don't use display-weight type for labels, buttons, or status indicators.
Don't put a modal in front of an action that could be done inline.
